title: cephalaria gazipashensis subsp. gazipashensis
intro: Cephalaria gazipashensis subsp. gazipashensis, also known as Gazipash Cephalaria, is a plant species in the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae), native to Turkey. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Cephalaria gazipashensis subsp. gazipashensis is used in herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
